mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TITLE, C.COMPANY_NAME, U.USER_ID, P.POST_DATE, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.ANSWER_STATUS FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST' ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(POST_NUMBER) FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST'

SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, P.USER_NUMBER, U.USER_ID, P.POST_DATE, P.VIEW_COUNT, P.ANSWER_STATUS FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_NUMBER = #{postNumber} AND P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST'

SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TYPE, P.ADMIN_NUMBER, A.ADMIN_ID, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, P.POST_DATE, P.EDIT_DATE, P.VIEW_COUNT FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_ADMIN A ON P.ADMIN_NUMBER = A.ADMIN_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_NOTICE' ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_POST ( POST_NUMBER, POST_TYPE, USER_NUMBER, ADMIN_NUMBER, COMPANY_NUMBER, ANSWER_STATUS, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, POST_DATE, VIEW_COUNT, EDIT_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_POST_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, 'QNA_NOTICE', NULL, #{adminNumber}, NULL, NULL, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, SYSDATE, 0, SYSDATE )
